_note: Blank schema for actual spend records, entry by entry. Real data lives in pipeline/finance/cost-actuals.local.json (gitignored). Entries are recorded by the human (or proposed by the system from receipts the human provides) and never invented. is_capex classification is organizational, not a tax determination (see _boundary). project_ref/deal_id link spend back to the project and deal so deal-debrief can compute true profitability with human review.
_boundary: ARITHMETIC AND RESEARCH NOTES. NOT TAX, ACCOUNTING, OR INVESTMENT ADVICE. REVIEW WITH A CPA OR TAX PROFESSIONAL BEFORE FILING OR RELYING ON CATEGORIZATIONS.

entries.category: production_materials | equipment_capex | software_subscriptions | contractor_labor | travel | shipping_and_fees
